Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Continued To Jul-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Gilbert Purcell, Esq. for Plaintiff: Clarence Davis.
Order waiving live Witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence and testimony of Mr. Purcell, at the Court's own Motion to DISMISS based on CCP. 583.310, and pursuant to the stipulation for the date of the hearing.
Motion is set for July 26, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Mr. Purcell to prepare and file a declaration of the stipulation and waiving notice of the hearing date.
Counsel to file brief and argument by July 19, 2007 and submit a curtouesy copy to the court.
